messages.content: You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: [24]7.ai

## [24]7.ai — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Enterprise customer engagement AI provider [24]7.ai suffered a major 2017-2018 data breach affecting client payment data, faced lawsuits, and underwent significant workforce restructuring despite remaining privately operating.

### Lesson
A security failure at a customer-engagement vendor handling sensitive payment data can trigger years of reputational and financial damage even without an outright shutdown.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: 18percent

## 18percent — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
18percent was an anonymous peer-support chat platform for mental health that shut down in 2020, citing the difficulty of moderating peer support safely and sustainably at scale.

### Lesson
Peer-to-peer mental health support platforms carry acute safety and moderation liabilities that are hard to fund and staff at seed stage.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? 22seven

## 22seven — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
South African personal finance and budgeting app was discontinued by owner Old Mutual in 2023 after over a decade of operation failed to produce a standalone profitable business.

### Lesson
Personal finance aggregator apps often struggle to monetize directly, making them vulnerable to being cut once a parent reassesses ROI.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: 23andMe

## 23andMe — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Consumer genomics company shut down its therapeutics division after failing to produce a viable pipeline, then filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy amid a data breach scandal.

### Lesson
A massive proprietary genetic dataset is a research asset, not automatically a drug discovery business.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: 24 Hour Fitness

## 24 Hour Fitness — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Gym chain 24 Hour Fitness filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in 2020, closing over 100 clubs after pandemic shutdowns devastated revenue under a heavy debt load.

### Lesson
Highly leveraged, capital-intensive physical fitness chains have little buffer against a sudden demand shock.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? 2U Inc.

## 2U Inc. — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Online program management company that powered university degrees and acquired edX filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy after years of stock decline and unsustainable university revenue-share contracts.

### Lesson
Revenue-share contracts with universities can become structurally unprofitable as the market matures.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: 38 Studios

## 38 Studios — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Curt Schilling's studio shipped Kingdoms of Amalur: Reckoning but collapsed under debt from a $75M Rhode Island state-backed loan before its planned MMO ever shipped.

### Lesson
Betting a studio's survival on an unshipped MMO while carrying huge state-backed debt is a fatal combination.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: 3D Robotics

## 3D Robotics — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Drone manufacturer that abandoned consumer hardware after massive losses in 2015-2016, pivoted to construction/mapping software (Site Scan), and eventually wound down that business as well.

### Lesson
Competing on drone hardware against low-cost incumbents is a losing battle; pivoting to software after burning through hardware capital rarely leaves enough runway to succeed.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? 3D Robotics (3DR)

## 3D Robotics (3DR) — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
3D Robotics exited consumer and agricultural drone hardware manufacturing in 2015 after being outcompeted by Chinese manufacturer DJI, pivoting to enterprise drone software instead.

### Lesson
Hardware startups competing against a vertically integrated low-cost manufacturer need a clear differentiation beyond the airframe itself.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: 3DO Company

## 3DO Company — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Trip Hawkins' console-and-publishing venture never recovered from the costly failure of its 3DO Interactive Multiplayer hardware, eventually filing for bankruptcy.

### Lesson
Launching proprietary game hardware against entrenched console makers requires far more capital than most startups can raise.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: 4C Insights

## 4C Insights — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Social and TV ad-tech platform 4C Insights shut down in 2019, selling some assets, after failing to achieve profitability in the competitive cross-channel ad measurement space.

### Lesson
Cross-channel measurement platforms need a clear cost advantage or proprietary data to outlast better-funded rivals.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? 51Talk

## 51Talk — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
China-based online English tutoring company that IPO'd in 2016 but saw its stock collapse over 95% after the 2021 tutoring crackdown forced a pivot to overseas markets.

### Lesson
Diversifying geographic exposure early can matter more than domestic market share.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: 5miles

## 5miles — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Local classifieds and secondhand marketplace app raised heavy funding but was shut down around 2019 after failing to compete with letgo and OfferUp.

### Lesson
Heavily funded but undifferentiated marketplace apps struggle once category leaders consolidate share.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: 6 River Systems

## 6 River Systems — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Warehouse collaborative-robot maker (Chuck) was acquired by Shopify for $450M in 2019, then shut down in 2023 after Shopify exited the logistics business and sold its fulfillment assets to Flexport.

### Lesson
A robotics unit's fate can hinge entirely on its parent company's own strategic pivots, independent of its own performance.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? 8base

## 8base — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
GraphQL backend-as-a-service and low-code platform that shut down operations in 2023 after failing to reach sustainable scale.

### Lesson
Backend-as-a-service platforms compete directly with well-funded hyperscaler offerings (Firebase, AWS Amplify), which raises the bar for differentiation.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: 8fit

## 8fit — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Workout and nutrition app 8fit was shut down in 2023 after its parent company failed to find a sustainable path in the crowded fitness app market.

### Lesson
Even a well-funded fitness app under a media conglomerate can be discontinued if it can't differentiate from larger competitors.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: 8i

## 8i — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
8i, a volumetric video capture startup for VR/AR holographic content, wound down operations around 2020 after failing to reach sustainable commercial scale despite high-profile partnerships.

### Lesson
Volumetric capture technology required expensive studio infrastructure that outran demand for holographic VR/AR content.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? 8tracks

## 8tracks — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Independent playlist-sharing streaming radio service that operated for 17 years before shutting down in 2023 citing an unsustainable business amid streaming giant competition.

### Lesson
Niche streaming services face relentless margin pressure once the market consolidates around a few well-capitalized giants.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: A123 Systems

## A123 Systems — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
MIT spinout A123 built lithium-iron-phosphate batteries for EVs and grid storage but filed for bankruptcy in 2012 after costly recalls and thin automotive margins; assets were sold to Wanxiang.

### Lesson
Being first to market with new battery chemistry doesn't protect against quality failures and margin pressure from automotive customers.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: Aaptiv

## Aaptiv — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Audio-based workout app Aaptiv shut down in 2023 after failing to differentiate against free and video-based fitness content competitors.

### Lesson
An audio-only fitness content model struggled to retain subscribers once video-based and free alternatives proliferated.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? AAX (Atom Asset Exchange)

## AAX (Atom Asset Exchange) — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Hong Kong-based crypto exchange suspended withdrawals in November 2022 and was later found to have misused customer funds, ceasing operations amid the post-FTX confidence crisis.

### Lesson
A crisis of confidence across the industry exposes exchanges that were already commingling or misusing customer funds.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: ABC Learning Centres

## ABC Learning Centres — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
ABC Learning Centres grew via aggressive debt-fueled acquisition into the world's largest listed childcare operator, then collapsed into receivership in 2008 owing roughly AU$1.6 billion, becoming one of the largest childcare-sector failures on record.

### Lesson
Roll-up growth in childcare funded by debt rather than sustainable per-center unit economics can implode rapidly once credit markets tighten.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: ABL Space Systems

## ABL Space Systems — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Small-launch vehicle developer lost its RS1 rocket in a January 2023 launch failure and lost a second vehicle in a July 2024 static-fire fire, leading to two rounds of layoffs and a strategic pivot away from commercial launch toward missile-defense interceptor work.

### Lesson
Consecutive vehicle losses in a capital-starved small-launch market can force a pivot away from the original business entirely.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? Abound Solar

## Abound Solar — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Thin-film cadmium telluride solar panel maker that shut down after being unable to compete with falling silicon panel prices from China.

### Lesson
A cost advantage in thin-film solar evaporated once conventional silicon panel prices fell faster than expected.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: Abstract

## Abstract — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Design version-control platform aiming to be 'Git for designers' that shut down in 2023 as design workflows consolidated around Figma's built-in collaboration.

### Lesson
Point solutions solving one workflow problem are at risk when platform incumbents absorb that functionality natively.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: Abundant Robotics

## Abundant Robotics — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Apple-picking robotics startup Abundant Robotics, spun out of SRI International, ceased operations in late 2021 after struggling to commercialize its harvesting robots at scale.

### Lesson
Field-robotics products must handle far more variability than lab conditions before they can be commercially deployed profitably.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? Acclaim Entertainment

## Acclaim Entertainment — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Aggressive licensing deals and mediocre movie tie-in games buried the publisher in debt until it liquidated in 2004.

### Lesson
Betting the business on movie-licensed games is a low-margin, high-risk strategy.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: Achaogen

## Achaogen — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Won FDA approval for antibiotic Zemdri in 2018 but filed for bankruptcy within a year because hospitals rarely used novel antibiotics, generating almost no revenue.

### Lesson
Antibiotics face a broken market where clinical need doesn't translate into reimbursed volume.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: Acorns

## Acorns — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Micro-investing and banking app's planned SPAC merger, valuing it near $2.2 billion, was called off in 2022 amid a market downturn for fintech valuations.

### Lesson
A collapsed public-listing plan can strand a fintech's growth strategy even if the underlying product keeps operating.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? Adconion Media Group

## Adconion Media Group — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Global ad network Adconion Media Group had several executives criminally charged by the US Department of Justice for wire fraud related to hijacking IP address blocks for ad inventory, severely damaging the company before its assets were sold off.

### Lesson
Ad-tech supply-side fraud, even at the executive level, can permanently taint a company's ability to operate.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: Adly

## Adly — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Celebrity and influencer marketing platform Adly, an early mover in influencer advertising, shut down around 2016 after failing to build a scalable, repeatable business model.

### Lesson
Being an early mover in a new advertising category isn't enough without a repeatable, scalable sales motion.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: Adobe Advertising Cloud

## Adobe Advertising Cloud — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Adobe shut down its Advertising Cloud DSP business in 2023, exiting the ad-buying market entirely after years of trying to compete with Google and The Trade Desk, and laid off the associated team.

### Lesson
Even a large enterprise software company can fail to break into ad-tech if it can't match scale players' data and reach.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? Aereo

## Aereo — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Aereo let subscribers stream local broadcast TV via tiny remote antennas, bypassing retransmission fees. The Supreme Court ruled this violated copyright law, forcing immediate shutdown.

### Lesson
Building a media business on an untested legal loophole is a bet on courts, not customers.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: AeroFarms

## AeroFarms — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Vertical farming pioneer AeroFarms filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in June 2023 after failing to reach profitability despite over a decade of operation and heavy investment.

### Lesson
Novel growing technology alone cannot overcome persistently negative unit economics.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: AeroVironment agricultural drone unit

## AeroVironment agricultural drone unit — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
AeroVironment's agricultural imaging drone product line was discontinued around 2021 as the company refocused entirely on defense-sector drone contracts.

### Lesson
Diversified drone manufacturers often exit lower-margin agricultural applications when higher-margin defense contracts offer a better return on R&D.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? Africrypt

## Africrypt — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
South African crypto investment platform vanished in 2021 after its teenage founders allegedly disappeared with an estimated $3.6 billion in client Bitcoin, one of the largest alleged crypto frauds ever.

### Lesson
Platforms promising outsized trading returns with opaque strategies and no independent custody are classic fraud red flags.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: AgBiome

## AgBiome — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Biological crop-protection company AgBiome laid off most of its staff in 2023 and ceased core operations in 2024 after failing to commercialize its microbial discovery platform at scale.

### Lesson
Ag-biologicals discovery platforms require very long development timelines that can outlast the patience of venture funding cycles.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: AgEagle Aerial Systems

## AgEagle Aerial Systems — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Agricultural and enterprise drone maker built via a string of acquisitions (senseFly, MicaSense, senseFly) has posted years of losses and repeated restructurings, with its stock down over 95% from its 2021 peak.

### Lesson
Rolling up multiple drone-hardware acquisitions doesn't create synergy if the combined business still can't reach profitability.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? AgriProtein

## AgriProtein — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
AgriProtein was an early leader in insect-based protein for animal feed, building large-scale fly farms, but it filed for bankruptcy in 2019 after a large planned funding round collapsed.

### Lesson
Scaling capital-intensive novel-protein infrastructure ahead of secured, committed funding leaves a company exposed to a single failed raise.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: Airobotics

## Airobotics — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Israeli maker of automated 'drone-in-a-box' industrial inspection systems went public via SPAC in 2022 but wound down commercial operations later that year amid mounting losses.

### Lesson
A SPAC listing provides capital but not a fix for an underlying business that cannot reach profitable unit economics.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: Airspace Systems

## Airspace Systems — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Counter-drone (anti-drone interception) startup raised significant venture capital but shut down around 2020 as the counter-UAS market proved smaller and more regulation-bound than expected.

### Lesson
Security markets tied to government procurement cycles can move far slower than a startup's venture-funded runway allows.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? Airspan Networks

## Airspan Networks — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
5G and Open RAN hardware vendor filed prepackaged Chapter 11 bankruptcy in 2024 after Open RAN adoption grew far slower than expected.

### Lesson
Building capacity for a market inflection point that arrives years late can bankrupt a company waiting for it.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: Airware

## Airware — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Drone operating-system and analytics company serving construction, mining, and insurance that shut down in 2018 after pivoting away from hardware failed to find a sustainable business.

### Lesson
Pivoting from hardware to software mid-flight can strand a company without a clear competitive moat in either market.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: Akili Interactive

## Akili Interactive — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Maker of EndeavorRx, the first FDA-cleared video-game-based digital therapeutic for ADHD, went public via SPAC but struggled commercially and sold its core assets in 2024 after running low on cash.

### Lesson
FDA clearance alone doesn't guarantee payer coverage or consumer willingness to pay.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? Akudo

## Akudo — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Indian neobank for teenagers and young adults shut down in 2023 after failing to raise a follow-on round in a cooling funding environment.

### Lesson
Youth-focused neobanking is a crowded niche where undifferentiated players cannot outlast a funding winter.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: Al Jazeera America

## Al Jazeera America — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Qatar-backed Al Jazeera's U.S. cable and digital news channel shut down after less than three years due to low ratings and an inability to secure widespread cable distribution.

### Lesson
Heavy capital investment cannot overcome a structurally difficult distribution environment for a new entrant news brand.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: Alameda Research

## Alameda Research — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Sam Bankman-Fried's crypto trading firm collapsed alongside FTX in November 2022 after it emerged the firm had been using billions in FTX customer deposits to cover trading losses.

### Lesson
A trading firm with privileged, undisclosed access to an affiliated exchange's customer funds is a fraud waiting to be discovered.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? Algorithmia

## Algorithmia — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Machine learning model deployment and MLOps platform that was acquired for parts by DataRobot after struggling to monetize ahead of the MLOps market maturing.

### Lesson
Being early to MLOps meant burning cash years before enterprise budgets and workflows caught up to the category.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: Allbirds

## Allbirds — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Sustainable footwear/apparel D2C brand's stock collapsed over 95% from IPO highs by 2025, with the company disclosing 'substantial doubt' about its ability to continue as a going concern before attempting a speculative pivot to AI infrastructure in 2026.

### Lesson
A single hero product and premium pricing rarely sustain growth once competitors copy the design and category hype fades.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: Allied Esports Entertainment

## Allied Esports Entertainment — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
The Nasdaq-listed owner of the World Poker Tour and Esports Arena venues saw its stock collapse after its SPAC-style listing as venue and event revenue badly underperformed projections.

### Lesson
Physical esports venues carry heavy fixed costs that don't scale down gracefully when attendance disappoints.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? AllThingsD

## AllThingsD — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Kara Swisher and Walt Mossberg's influential tech-news site under The Wall Street Journal ended in 2013 after a contract dispute with Dow Jones, prompting the founders to depart and launch Re/code.

### Lesson
A media brand's value is often inseparable from its star journalists, who can walk and rebuild elsewhere when contract terms sour.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: Alooma

## Alooma — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Israeli data-pipeline/ETL startup acquired by Google Cloud in 2019; Google discontinued the standalone product around 2022 in favor of its own Data Fusion offering.

### Lesson
Being acquired by a cloud hyperscaler often means the acquired product gets absorbed and eventually replaced by the parent's native tooling.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: AltaRock Energy

## AltaRock Energy — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
AltaRock Energy pursued enhanced geothermal systems using engineered fracturing to access deep heat, but its flagship Newberry Volcano project was abandoned after inducing seismic concerns, and the company wound down operations.

### Lesson
Enhanced geothermal fracturing techniques carry induced-seismicity risks that can halt a project regardless of the underlying resource potential.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? AltSchool

## AltSchool — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
AltSchool, a venture-backed network of tech-driven micro-schools serving preschool through middle-school ages, closed most of its own schools by 2019 after pivoting to license its software (renamed Altitude Learning) rather than operate campuses.

### Lesson
Running physical schools is a fundamentally different, much slower-margin business than software; a mid-course pivot from operator to software vendor left AltSchool without a working business model in either lane.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Tell the story of this startup: AltspaceVR

## AltspaceVR — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
AltspaceVR, an early social VR platform acquired by Microsoft in 2017, was permanently shut down by Microsoft in 2023 as the company consolidated its mixed-reality strategy around Mesh and HoloLens.

### Lesson
Being acquired does not guarantee longevity; a parent company's strategic pivot can still shut down a previously acquired social VR product.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Explain the history and key events: Amazon Care

## Amazon Care — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Amazon's in-house telehealth and home-visit service for employees and enterprise clients was shut down in 2022 as Amazon pivoted its healthcare strategy toward acquiring One Medical.

### Lesson
Even deep-pocketed corporate backers will kill a healthcare bet that doesn't show a path to scale.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What happened to this company and why? Amazon Fire Phone

## Amazon Fire Phone — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Amazon's foray into smartphones with a 3D display flopped commercially, forcing a $170M inventory write-down and discontinuation within a year.

### Lesson
Gimmicky hardware features don't substitute for a compelling reason to switch platforms.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Analyze the founders and timeline: American Apparel

## American Apparel — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Vertically-integrated 'Made in USA' fashion retailer filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy twice (2015 and 2016) amid founder scandal, debt, and sales declines, and fully liquidated its US operations in 2017.

### Lesson
Founder misconduct scandals compound financial distress and can accelerate an already-troubled retailer into liquidation.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
Summarize the key metrics and narrative: Amigo Loans

## Amigo Loans — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
UK guarantor loan provider entered insolvency proceedings in 2024 after a wave of mis-selling compensation claims overwhelmed the business.

### Lesson
Guarantor and high-cost consumer lending is especially exposed to regulator-driven redress schemes.
You are a seasoned VC partner analyzing startup case studies.
What's the lesson from this case? Amiigo

## Amiigo — ✗ FAILED

### Timeline
(No timeline data)

### Key Metrics
(No metrics)

### Narrative
Crowdfunded fitness tracker startup Amiigo failed to deliver its product to backers and shut down in 2014 after running out of funding.
